description: VERIFIED LIVE: Pinterest via content-script DOM extraction (no API key — Pinterest's API is an approval-gated business API). Pinterest renders pins publicly in stable [data-test-id] markup, so these tools read pins straight from the DOM of your open Pinterest tab. Navigate the tab to a search (/search/pins/?q=…) or a board, then call the matching tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a search page: 15 pins with pin url, image url and image description extracted correctly.

tools.name: pinterest_search_results
tools.description: Pins on the current Pinterest SEARCH page (navigate the tab to /search/pins/?q=<query> first). Returns each pin's url, image url and image description (the alt text Pinterest generates). VERIFIED.

tools.name: pinterest_board_pins
tools.description: Pins shown on the current Pinterest BOARD or profile page (navigate the tab to /<user>/<board>/ first). Same fields as search: pin url, image url, description.
